name: Median Group Inc.
summary: Median Group Inc. operates as a digital service provider in Malaysia. The company offers post-paid telecom services. It also provides network design, construction, and maintenance services for fiber optics backbone and fiber-to-the-home broadband services. The company was formerly known as Clixster Mobile Group Inc. and changed its name to Median Group Inc. in October 2015. Median Group Inc. is based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.
